Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-29 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum-ranker-long dashboard shows two exceptional performers at the top ranks: CLMT and EACO both display extraordinary long-term returns with CLMT posting 874.45% over 10 years and EACO reaching an extreme 1758.23% over the same period. Both tickers pass all four moving average filters (SMA 30/50/100/200), indicating sustained uptrends, and both significantly outperform SPY across all measured timeframes—CLMT by 603.99% over 10 years and EACO by 1487.77%. CLMT ranks #1 with a score of 93.4 and shows clean momentum signals with normal volatility, while EACO's exceptional 10-year return ratio of 3.82x suggests acceleration in gains over longer holding periods. The data highlights a small set of stocks with multi-year compounding strength, though EACO's 1758% decade return represents a statistical extreme that warrants scrutiny regarding survivorship and market conditions.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
